text: The strongest continued pretraining workflows preserve a clean separation between raw-text training data and prompt-based evaluation data.
If a candidate model outperforms the baseline on the golden set, the deployment flow can promote the candidate endpoint into the stable baseline role.
Running evaluation against the real served endpoint verifies model loading, request handling, and text quality at the same time.
A good golden set mixes public concepts with domain-specific prompts so a model is tested for both general correctness and repository-specific knowledge.
